conflict: June fears Eli left because she left; any evasive answer will harden permanent distance.
consequence: Eli states the flight was his own cowardice, June sets explicit contact boundaries, and Eli begins a smaller accountable life in a rented apartment.
must_land_beats: Winter highway drive with ordinary parent-child logistics
Boundary agreement: weekly call, no surprise visits, transparent money updates
objective: Drive June back to campus and answer the question she has avoided asking.
